title: Iran Update Special Report, March 29, 2026 | ISW
takeaways_en: The Washington Post reported on March 29 that the combined force has struck four key Iranian ballistic missile production facilities and 29 missile launch bases since the start of the war. ISW-CTP has similarly recorded strikes on over 20 missile bases during the war.

Senior Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) officials continue to dismiss Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian's concerns about Iran's economic conditions amid Iran's war with the United States and Israel. Anti-regime media reported on March 28 that there is a deepening rift between Pezeshkian and IRGC Commander Brigadier General Ahmad Vahidi over the regime's actions during the war and the war's mounting economic and social costs.

The Iranian regime appears to be appealing to nationalist sentiments to recruit members of the Iranian population to help the regime maintain internal security. The Wall Street Journal reported on March 29 that Iran has launched a recruitment campaign called 'Janfada,' or 'Sacrificing Life,' to recruit volunteers to fight US forces in the event of a US ground operation in Iran.

Russia continues to help Iran conduct attacks across the Middle East. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said that Russia is providing Iran with satellite imagery of US military assets in the region, including Diego Garcia, Incirlik Airbase in Turkey, Al Udeid Airbase in Qatar, and Shaybah oil and gas field in Saudi Arabia.
takeaways_zh: 【导弹设施打击】《华盛顿邮报》3月29日报道，联合部队自战争开始以来已打击四个关键伊朗弹道导弹生产设施和29个导弹发射基地。ISW-CTP同样记录了战争期间对20多个导弹基地的打击。
【伊朗内部分歧】伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）高级官员继续无视伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬（Masoud Pezeshkian）对伊朗经济状况的担忧。反政权媒体3月28日报道称，佩泽希齐扬与IRGC总司令瓦希迪（Ahmad Vahidi）将军之间的裂痕正在加深，原因是对战争行动及战争造成的经济和社会成本的分歧。
【民族主义动员】伊朗政权似乎在诉诸民族主义情绪来招募伊朗民众帮助维持内部安全。《华尔街日报》3月29日报道，伊朗发起了一项名为'Janfada'（牺牲生命）的招募活动，招募志愿者在美国对伊朗发动地面行动时与美作战。
【俄罗斯支持】俄罗斯继续帮助伊朗在中东发动袭击。乌克兰总统泽连斯基表示，俄罗斯向伊朗提供美国军事资产的卫星图像，包括迪戈加西亚基地、土耳其因吉尔利克空军基地、卡塔尔乌代德空军基地和沙特谢巴油气田。
toplines_en: The Washington Post reported on March 29 that the combined force has struck four key Iranian ballistic missile production facilities and 29 missile launch bases since the start of the war. ISW-CTP has similarly recorded strikes on over 20 missile bases during the war. The Washington Post assessed that combined force airstrikes have caused 'severe damage' to the Khojir, Shahroud, Parchin, and Hakimiyeh missile production facilities. Four experts told the Washington Post that the damage to these facilities has 'most likely halted Iran's ability to produce short-range and medium-range ballistic missiles until the facilities can be rebuilt.'

Khojir Military Complex (Tehran Province): The Washington Post, citing satellite imagery from March 24, reported that the combined force has destroyed at least 88 structures at the Khojir Military Complex. ISW-CTP observed reports of strikes on the Khojir Military Complex on March 3. The Khojir complex is a research, development, and manufacturing facility for solid- and liquid-fuel missiles. An analyst at the James Martin Center for Nonproliferation Studies assessed on March 6 that the combined force had struck mixing and casting buildings at the Khojir complex. The IDF also confirmed on March 29 that it struck a facility at Khojir that produced unspecified 'critical components' for the 'assembly and operationalization' of missiles. The IDF noted that the facility was only one of two facilities in Iran that produced such components.

Shahroud Military Complex (Semnan Province): The Washington Post, citing satellite imagery, reported that the combined force has damaged or destroyed at least 28 structures at the Shahroud Military Complex. The combined force has struck the Shahroud Military Complex multiple times during the war. An analyst at the James Martin Center for Nonproliferation Studies identified on March 7 that the Israel Defense Forces (IDF) had damaged a mixing building, casting building, and 'warhead production line' at the facility. The IDF struck buildings at the Shahroud Military Facility during the June 2025 Israel-Iran War that had previously housed planetary mixers. Planetary mixers are essential for producing ballistic missile solid fuel. The IDF previously destroyed 12 Iranian planetary mixers, likely including mixers at Shahroud, during its October 2024 strikes on Iran. Satellite imagery published by the Associated Press in September 2025 showed that Iran had started repairing damaged mixer buildings at Shahroud. An Israeli analyst separately published satellite imagery on March 19 that shows that the combined force struck a launch pad at the Shahroud Military Complex between March 11 and 19.

Parchin Military Complex (Tehran Province): The Washington Post, citing satellite imagery from March 12, reported that the combined force has struck 12 structures at the Parchin Military Complex. ISW-CTP has observed numerous reports of strikes on the Parchin Military Complex, including on March 3, March 7, March 12, March 26, and March 28. The Institute for Science and International Security assessed on March 6 that combined force airstrikes caused 'significant damage' to solid rocket propellant motor production facilities at Parchin. The combined force also struck the Taleghan 2 site at Parchin on March 12. The Iranian regime previously used the Taleghan 2 facility to test explosives that are needed to detonate a nuclear device before the regime suspended its nuclear weapons program in 2003.

Hakimiyeh Military Complex (Tehran Province): The Washington Post, citing satellite imagery from March 14, reported that the combined force has struck 19 structures at the Hakimiyeh Military Complex. The Washington Post noted that the Hakimiyeh Military Complex contains facilities that produce liquid propellant and missile launchers. The IDF issued an evacuation warning for the Hakimiyeh Industrial Zone in northwestern Tehran on March 3.
The Washington Post also reported that the combined force has struck at least 29 missile launch bases thus far. The Washington Post highlighted damage to the following two bases:

Khorgu Missile Base (Hormozgan Province): The Washington Post, citing satellite imagery from March 9, reported that the combined force has destroyed 15 facilities and struck two tunnel entrances at the Khorgu Missile Base. The Washington Post assessed that the combined force has struck this base at least twice during the war. Two OSINT accounts previously published satellite imagery from March 18 that showed damage to multiple munition bunkers and multiple support buildings at the Khorgu Missile Base.

Imam Ali Missile Base (Lorestan Province): An imagery analyst at the security intelligence firm Janes told the Washington Post that the combined force has struck nine aboveground structures and at least two tunnel entrances at the Imam Ali Missile Base. The combined force has struck the Imam Ali Missile Base several times during the war, including with bunker buster munitions. The Imam Ali Missile Base is home to the IRGC Aerospace Force al Hadid 7th Missile Brigade and al Tawhid 23rd Missile Brigade. The base reportedly stores Shahab-3 ballistic missiles, which have a range of between 800 and 1,300 kilometers. OSINT accounts circulated footage on March 27 of a funeral for an IRGC Aerospace Force commander who reportedly died in combined force airstrikes targeting the Imam Ali Missile Base.

Senior Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) officials continue to dismiss Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian's concerns about Iran's economic conditions amid Iran's war with the United States and Israel. Anti-regime media reported on March 28 that there is a deepening rift between Pezeshkian and IRGC Commander Brigadier General Ahmad Vahidi over the regime's actions during the war and the war's mounting economic and social costs, citing unspecified informed sources. Pezeshkian reportedly warned that the IRGC's attacks on regional countries are exacerbating economic damage, cautioning that Iran's economy could collapse within three to four weeks if Iran does not reach a ceasefire with the United States and Israel. This report is consistent with a March 16 report that Pezeshkian voiced concerns over the war's impact on the Iranian economy but that an IRGC official dismissed Pezeshkian's concerns. Pezeshkian has also reportedly demanded 'the restoration of executive and managerial authorities' to the government, but Vahidi has rejected this demand, according to the March 28 anti-regime media report. The regime's poor management of the economy, which includes rampant corruption and IRGC control over broad swaths of the economy, has long hurt the Iranian economy and recently triggered the December 2025-January 2026 anti-regime protests. The current conflict will likely further deteriorate Iran's economic conditions. The combined force conducted airstrikes on several Iranian steel factories on March 27 and 28, which an Israeli military correspondent assessed are 'expected to cause major damage' to the Iranian economy. The conflict and regime-imposed internet shutdown have also had negative consequences for the private sector. A restaurant owner in Tehran told a BBC Persian reporter on March 28 that 'many businesses are completely shut down now.' The restaurant owner added that they think they can only keep their business running for two more weeks.

The Iranian regime appears to be appealing to nationalist sentiments to recruit members of the Iranian population to help the regime maintain internal security. The Wall Street Journal reported on March 29 that Iran has launched a recruitment campaign called 'Janfada,' or 'Sacrificing Life,' to recruit volunteers to fight US forces in the event of a US ground operation in Iran, citing a text message sent to Iranian mobile users. The name of this campaign suggests that the regime seeks to appeal to nationalist sentiments by calling on Iranians to sacrifice their lives for Iran. The name of the campaign notably echoes a popular Iranian protest slogan, although it is unclear whether the regime intentionally mirrored the language of this slogan. The Wall Street Journal report separately noted that security forces set up checkpoints in Esfahan City and surrounding towns on March 28.

Russia continues to help Iran conduct attacks across the Middle East. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said that Russia is providing Iran with satellite imagery of US military assets in the region. Zelensky told NBC News that Russian satellites captured images of Prince Sultan Airbase near Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, on March 20, 23, and 25. Iran struck the base on March 27, injuring several US service members and damaging aircraft. Zelensky's statement follows reports that Russia has supplied Iran with satellite imagery and Shahed drones since the war began. Zelensky also said that Russia took satellite imagery of the US-UK base in Diego Garcia on March 24 as well as the Incirlik Airbase in Turkey, Al Udeid Airbase in Qatar, and the Shaybah oil and gas field in Saudi Arabia on March 26. Russian efforts to take images of these sites indicate that Russia is helping Iran attack not only US assets but also Turkish and British assets. Iran has attacked all of these sites since the war began. Iran continues to coerce vessels to comply with its new rules for transiting the Strait of Hormuz. Pakistani Foreign Affairs Minister Ishaq Dar stated on March 28 that Iran agreed to allow 20 additional Pakistani ships to pass through the strait. He stated that two ships will transit the strait each day. Iran has allowed some Pakistani oil tankers and other vessels to pass safely through an Iranian-approved route around Larak Island. Iran has required some vessels to pay a transit fee. An OSINT analyst assessed on March 28 that IRGC Navy fast attack craft are patrolling the area between Larak Island and Qeshm Island in the Persian Gulf and are likely serving as 'toll collectors.'
toplines_zh: 【总体打击情况】《华盛顿邮报》3月29日报道，联合部队自战争开始以来已打击四个关键伊朗弹道导弹生产设施和29个导弹发射基地。ISW-CTP同样记录了战争期间对20多个导弹基地的打击。《华盛顿邮报》评估称联合部队空袭对霍吉尔、沙赫鲁德、帕尔钦和哈基米耶导弹生产设施造成'严重损坏'。四位专家告诉《华盛顿邮报》，这些设施的损坏'很可能已使伊朗在设施重建之前无法生产短程和中程弹道导弹'。

【霍吉尔军事综合体（德黑兰省）】《华盛顿邮报》援引3月24日卫星图像报道称，联合部队已摧毁霍吉尔军事综合体的至少88处建筑。ISW-CTP曾在3月3日观察到对该综合体的打击报告。霍吉尔综合体是固液燃料导弹的研发和制造设施。詹姆斯·马丁防扩散研究中心分析师3月6日评估称，联合部队打击了该综合体的混合和浇注建筑。以色列国防军（IDF）3月29日证实，其打击了霍吉尔一个生产导弹'关键部件'用于'组装和作战化'的设施，并指出该设施是伊朗仅有的两个此类生产设施之一。

【沙赫鲁德军事综合体（塞姆南省）】《华盛顿邮报》卫星图像报道称，联合部队已损坏或摧毁沙赫鲁德军事综合体的至少28处建筑。联合部队在战争期间已多次打击该综合体。詹姆斯·马丁防扩散研究中心分析师3月7日确认，以色列国防军损坏了该设施的混合建筑、浇注建筑和'弹头生产线'。以色列国防军在2025年6月以伊战争期间曾打击该设施，当时建筑内安置有行星混合器——这是生产弹道导弹固体燃料的关键设备。以色列国防军在2024年10月对伊朗的打击中已摧毁12台伊朗行星混合器，可能包括沙赫鲁德的设备。美联社2025年9月卫星图像显示，伊朗已开始修复受损的混合器建筑。以色列分析师3月19日单独发布的卫星图像显示，联合部队在3月11日至19日期间打击了沙赫鲁德军事综合体的发射台。

【帕尔钦军事综合体（德黑兰省）】《华盛顿邮报》3月12日卫星图像报道称，联合部队已打击帕尔钦军事综合体的12处建筑。ISW-CTP已观察到3月3日、3月7日、3月12日、3月26日和3月28日多次打击该综合体的报告。国际科学与安全研究所3月6日评估称，联合部队空袭对帕尔钦的固体火箭推进剂发动机生产设施造成'重大损坏'。联合部队还于3月12日打击了帕尔钦的塔勒甘2号地点。伊朗政权此前曾利用塔勒甘2号设施测试引爆核武器所需的炸药，后于2003年暂停核武器计划。
【哈基米耶军事综合体（德黑兰省）】《华盛顿邮报》3月14日卫星图像报道称，联合部队已打击哈基米耶军事综合体的19处建筑。该报指出，哈基米耶军事综合体包含生产液体推进剂和导弹发射器的设施。以色列国防军于3月3日向德黑兰西北部哈基米耶工业区发布了撤离警告。
【导弹发射基地打击情况】《华盛顿邮报》还报道称，联合部队迄今已打击至少29个导弹发射基地。该报重点强调了对以下两个基地的损坏：
【霍尔古导弹基地（霍尔木兹甘省）】《华盛顿邮报》3月9日卫星图像报道称，联合部队已摧毁霍尔古导弹基地的15处设施并打击两个隧道入口。该报评估联合部队在战争期间至少两次打击该基地。两个开源情报账户此前发布3月18日卫星图像，显示该基地多处弹药掩体和支持建筑受损。

【伊玛目阿里导弹基地（洛雷斯坦省）】安全情报公司Janes的图像分析师告诉《华盛顿邮报》，联合部队已打击伊玛目阿里导弹基地的9处地面建筑和至少两个隧道入口。联合部队在战争期间已多次打击该基地，包括使用地堡破坏弹药。伊玛目阿里导弹基地是伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）航空航天部队哈迪德第7导弹旅和陶希德第23导弹旅的驻地。该基地 reportedly 储存射程800至1300公里的沙哈布-3弹道导弹。开源情报账户3月27日流传 footage 显示，一名伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队指挥官的葬礼，该指挥官 reportedly 死于联合部队针对伊玛目阿里导弹基地的空袭。

【伊朗内部分歧与经济影响】伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）高级官员继续无视伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬对伊朗经济状况的担忧。反政权媒体3月28日报道称，佩泽希齐扬与IRGC总司令瓦希迪将军之间的裂痕正在加深。据报道，佩泽希齐扬警告称IRGC对地区国家的攻击正在加剧经济损害，称如果伊朗不与美国和以色列达成停火，伊朗经济可能在三到四周内崩溃。IRGC官员无视佩泽希齐扬的担忧。政权对经济的糟糕管理（包括猖獗的腐败和IRGC对大片经济的控制）长期以来损害了伊朗经济，最近引发了2025年12月至2026年1月的反政权抗议。当前冲突可能会进一步恶化伊朗经济状况。联合部队3月27日和28日对多家伊朗钢铁厂进行空袭，一位以色列军事记者评估称这将对伊朗经济造成'重大损害'。冲突和政权强制实施的互联网关闭也对私营部门造成负面影响。

【民族主义动员】伊朗政权似乎在诉诸民族主义情绪来招募伊朗民众帮助维持内部安全。《华尔街日报》3月29日报道，伊朗发起了一项名为'Janfada'（牺牲生命）的招募活动，招募志愿者在美国对伊朗发动地面行动时与美作战。该活动的名称表明政权试图通过呼吁伊朗人为伊朗牺牲生命来诉诸民族主义情绪。该活动的名称明显呼应了一个流行的伊朗抗议口号。该报道还指出，安全部队3月28日在伊斯法罕市及周边城镇设置了检查站。

【俄罗斯支持霍尔木兹海峡】俄罗斯继续帮助伊朗在中东发动袭击。乌克兰总统泽连斯基表示，俄罗斯向伊朗提供美国军事资产的卫星图像。泽连斯基告诉NBC新闻，俄罗斯卫星于3月20日、23日和25日拍摄了利雅得附近苏丹王子空军基地的图像。伊朗于3月27日袭击了该基地，造成数名美军人员受伤并损坏飞机。泽连斯基还表示，俄罗斯于3月24日拍摄了迪戈加西亚英美基地的图像，并于3月26日拍摄了土耳其因吉尔利克空军基地、卡塔尔乌代德空军基地和沙特谢巴油气田的图像。俄罗斯拍摄这些地点图像的努力表明，俄罗斯正在帮助伊朗不仅袭击美国资产，还袭击土耳其和英国资产。伊朗自战争开始以来已袭击了所有这些地点。伊朗继续强迫船只遵守其关于通过霍尔木兹海峡的新规定。巴基斯坦外交部长达尔3月28日表示，伊朗同意允许另外20艘巴基斯坦船只通过海峡。他表示每天将有两艘船只通过海峡。伊朗已允许一些巴基斯坦油轮和其他船只通过拉拉克岛附近的伊朗批准航线安全通过。伊朗已要求一些船只支付过境费。一名开源情报分析师3月28日评估称，IRGC海军快速攻击艇正在拉拉克岛和格什姆岛之间的波斯湾海域巡逻，可能充当'收费员'。

charts.title_en: Iranian Retalitory Strikes Between March 28, 2026 and March 29, 2026
charts.title_zh: 伊朗报复性袭击（3月28日至29日）
context_zh: 该图表显示伊朗在2026年3月28日至29日期间对以色列的报复性导弹和无人机袭击。
伊朗在此期间向以色列发射了七轮导弹齐射，许多攻击集中在南部贝尔谢巴地区。
伊朗还针对海湾地区的铝业设施发动袭击，包括阿联酋全球铝业和巴林 Alba 铝厂。

charts.title_en: Iranian Ballistic Missiles, Cruise Missiles, and Drones Launched at the United Arab Emirates Between February 28, 2026 and March 29, 2026
charts.title_zh: 伊朗对阿联酋发射统计（2月28日至3月29日）
context_zh: 该图表显示伊朗在2026年2月28日至3月29日期间向阿联酋发射的弹道导弹、巡航导弹和无人机数量。
阿联酋3月29日拦截了16枚弹道导弹和42架无人机。
伊朗无人机和导弹袭击针对阿联酋全球铝业，该公司是地区和全球铝供应的关键节点。

charts.title_en: Iranian Ballistic Missiles, Cruise Missiles and Drones Launched at Kuwait Between February 28, 2026 and March 29, 2026
charts.title_zh: 伊朗对科威特发射统计（2月28日至3月29日）
context_zh: 该图表显示伊朗在2026年2月28日至3月29日期间向科威特发射的弹道导弹、巡航导弹和无人机数量。
科威特国防部报告过去24小时内探测到14枚导弹和12架无人机，使战争期间针对科威特的发射总数达到307枚弹道导弹、2枚巡航导弹和616架无人机。
伊朗袭击造成10名科威特军事人员受伤，并对私营物流公司的仓库造成物质损坏。

charts.title_en: Iranian Ballistic Missiles and Drones Launched at Saudi Arabia Between March 1, 2026 and March 29, 2026
charts.title_zh: 伊朗对沙特发射统计（3月1日至29日）
context_zh: 该图表显示伊朗在2026年3月1日至29日期间向沙特阿拉伯发射的弹道导弹和无人机数量。
沙特国防部报告3月29日拦截并摧毁了10架无人机。
俄罗斯卫星于3月20日、23日和25日拍摄了利雅得附近苏丹王子空军基地的图像，伊朗于3月27日袭击了该基地。

charts.title_zh: 伊朗对巴林发射统计（2月28日至3月29日）
context_zh: 该图表显示伊朗在2026年2月28日至3月29日期间向巴林发射的导弹和无人机数量。
伊朗针对海湾铝业设施（ALBA）发动袭击，该公司是地区和全球铝供应的关键节点。
ALBA确认两人轻伤，损坏评估正在进行中。

charts.title_en: Hezbollah Retaliatory Attacks on Israel and Lebanon Evening of March 29, 2026
charts.title_zh: 真主党报复性袭击（3月29日晚）
context_zh: 该图表显示真主党在2026年3月29日晚对以色列和黎巴嫩的报复性袭击。
真主党声称在3月28日下午2:00至3月29日下午2:00期间实施了57次袭击。
多数袭击针对黎巴嫩南部的以色列国防军士兵、车辆和阵地。

charts.title_en: Hezbollah-Claimed Attacks Targeting Israeli Forces and Positions in Israel Between March 1 and March 28, 2026
charts.title_zh: 真主党声称在以色列北部袭击总数（3月1日至28日）
context_zh: 该图表显示真主党声称在2026年3月1日至28日期间针对以色列军队和阵地的袭击次数。
真主党声称在Ainata附近的Ghadmatha地区使用两枚简易爆炸装置、无人机和轻中型武器伏击以色列国防军部队。
真主党还继续向北部以色列社区发射火箭和无人机，包括Hanita、Shtula和Nahariya。

charts.title_en: Hezbollah-Claimed Attacks Targeting Israeli Forces and Positions in Israel Between March 1 and March 28, 2026
charts.title_zh: 真主党声称袭击统计（3月1日至28日）
context_zh: 该图表显示真主党声称在2026年3月1日至28日期间针对以色列的袭击统计。
真主党声称在al Biyyadah和Chama城镇附近直接交战并向以色列国防军部队发射反坦克制导导弹和无人机。
以色列总理内塔尼亚胡3月29日指示以色列国防军扩大在黎巴嫩南部的'安全区'。
